carousel.title: Game Types
carousel.subtitle: Choose from strategy, exploration, and fast challenge formats.

home.headline: Adventure games for scouting events and team challenges
home.lede: Run complete outdoor and indoor game events with realtime coordination, team dashboards, and admin control.
home.panelLede: Teams can join with game and team code immediately.
home.panelFooter: Need an account first? Use registration and create your event setup.
home.featureOneText: Configure games, teams, and content from one consistent admin flow.
home.featureTwoText: Teams receive live state updates, feedback, and progress tracking while playing.
home.featureThreeText: Built for scouting groups and large youth events with multiple simultaneous teams.
home.stepsSubtitle: From setup to live gameplay in three simple stages.
home.step1Text: Pick a game mode and configure map points, settings, and schedule.
home.step2Text: Generate team codes and share quick login details before kickoff.
home.step3Text: Track progress live and guide teams with messaging, scoring, and overviews.

about.title: About JotiGames
about.subtitle: A flexible platform for event-ready multiplayer challenges.
about.missionText: Help youth organizations run fun, safe, and structured game experiences with minimal technical overhead.
about.offerText: Multiple game modes, team dashboards, live progress, and admin control with a single consistent interface.
about.everyoneText: Whether you organize one activity or a full event day, JotiGames scales from small groups to large competitions.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers for organizers and teams.
faq.a1: JotiGames is a game management platform for team-based challenge events.
faq.a2: No, teams can join with game and team codes while admins use user accounts.
faq.a3: Yes, most game modes are designed for map-based and field activities.
faq.q4: How do I create a game?
faq.a4: Register, sign in, and create a new game from your games area.
faq.a5: Yes, each game can have multiple teams with unique login codes.
faq.a6: Yes, module overviews and team states are available during gameplay.
faq.a7: Use Team Login and enter your game code and team code.
faq.a8: Yes, the frontend is browser-based and optimized for responsive use.
faq.a9: You can reconnect by opening the same game and team credentials again.

birdsOfPrey.autoDroppedMessage: An egg was auto-dropped for your team.

birds_of_prey.save_failed: Failed to save Birds of Prey config

admin.point_resource_required: Enable at least one resource for this point

team.map_hint: All trade points are visible. In-range points are highlighted.

gameInfo.flow1Text: Join {name} with your team and review the mission objectives.
gameInfo.flow2Text: Interact with map points, actions, and module mechanics to gain points.
gameInfo.flow3Text: Complete tasks efficiently and coordinate strategy to maximize score.
gameInfo.option1Text: {name} can be configured for short sessions or long event tracks.
gameInfo.option2Text: Players collaborate using shared objectives and live updates.
gameInfo.option3Text: Admins monitor progress and tune challenge complexity.

exploding_kittens.name: Exploding Kittens
exploding_kittens.shortDescription: A tense, strategic card battle with instant twists and risky scans.
exploding_kittens.subtitle: Defuse danger, outsmart rivals, and survive the deck.

geohunter.name: GeoHunter
geohunter.shortDescription: Explore map locations and solve place-based challenges.
geohunter.subtitle: Navigation and knowledge combine for smart field play.

blindhike.name: Blind Hike
blindhike.shortDescription: Follow clues with limited information and make tactical route choices.
blindhike.subtitle: Communication and trust matter as much as speed.

resource_run.name: Resource Run
resource_run.shortDescription: Capture strategic resources and optimize team movement.
resource_run.subtitle: Collect, protect, and race to the top of the board.

territory_control.name: Territory Control
territory_control.shortDescription: Claim zones and defend map control under pressure.
territory_control.subtitle: Map awareness and timing decide the winners.

market_crash.name: Market Crash
market_crash.shortDescription: Trade smartly while values shift and opportunities disappear fast.
market_crash.subtitle: Risk management and bold calls power your score.

crazy_88.name: Crazy 88
crazy_88.shortDescription: Creative task-based gameplay with fast submissions and reviews.
crazy_88.subtitle: Energy, creativity, and teamwork in one challenge loop.

courier_rush.name: Courier Rush
courier_rush.shortDescription: Coordinate pickups and dropoffs in a dynamic delivery race.
courier_rush.subtitle: Plan routes, avoid delays, and keep points flowing.

echo_hunt.name: Echo Hunt
echo_hunt.shortDescription: Find and claim hidden beacons in a tactical scavenger setup.
echo_hunt.subtitle: Observation and timing are your strongest tools.

checkpoint_heist.name: Checkpoint Heist
checkpoint_heist.shortDescription: Capture high-value checkpoints while opponents contest territory.
checkpoint_heist.subtitle: Offense and defense must stay perfectly balanced.

pandemic_response.name: Pandemic Response
pandemic_response.shortDescription: Coordinate hotspot response and supply pickups under time pressure.
pandemic_response.subtitle: Team coordination keeps your operations effective.

birds_of_prey.name: Birds of Prey
birds_of_prey.shortDescription: Compete over eggs and territory in a high-action map game.
birds_of_prey.subtitle: Aggression, defense, and timing shape every round.

code_conspiracy.name: Code Conspiracy
code_conspiracy.shortDescription: Solve cryptic puzzles and submit codes before rival teams do.
code_conspiracy.subtitle: Logic and collaboration unlock decisive points.

blindhike.map_pick_hint: Click on the map to set the target marker.
blindhike.target_location_help: Set the finish target teams must estimate and reach.
blindhike.target_latitude_help: Latitude of the hidden end target in decimal degrees.
blindhike.target_longitude_help: Longitude of the hidden end target in decimal degrees.
blindhike.obstacles_help: Apply map distortions that make orientation harder for teams.
blindhike.horizontal_flip_help: Mirror the map left-to-right for all teams.
blindhike.vertical_flip_help: Mirror the map top-to-bottom for all teams.
blindhike.scale_factor_help: Scales perceived distance: 1.0 = normal, higher = farther, lower = closer.
blindhike.rotation_help: Rotate the map view by degrees (0-360) for all teams.
blindhike.constraints_help: Limit marker usage so teams must place guesses strategically.
blindhike.max_markers_help: Maximum number of markers each team can place (empty = no limit).
blindhike.marker_cooldown_help: Seconds a team must wait between marker placements.
blindhike.finish_radius_meters_help: A team finishes when a marker is placed within this radius of the target.
blindhike.finish_radius_invalid: Finish radius must be at least 1 meter
blindhike.load_failed: Failed to load Blind Hike config
blindhike.save_failed: Failed to save Blind Hike config
